findings.summary: Variant b of ESP32 MOSFET board — coordinate-only differences from variant a. Output is logically identical confirming position-independent parsing. Same issues as variant a (flyback diode false negative, regulator cap false positive).

correct.description: All outputs identical to variant a despite coordinate changes

incorrect.description: Same flyback diode false negative as variant a
Same regulator cap false positive as variant a

suggestions: Use a/b pair for regression testing: any functional diff indicates position-dependent bug
